content: Supabase password reset for App Router: resetPasswordForEmail(email, {redirectTo}) sends the email; the link should use the token_hash email template variable pointing to a /auth/confirm route that calls verifyOtp({type:'recovery', token_hash}) to establish a session, then redirects to a /update-password page where updateUser({password}) is called. This PKC-safe token_hash+verifyOtp pattern is preferred over parsing access_token/refresh_token from a URL hash fragment for server-rendered apps.
